## Privacy Checklist

- [ ] No customer PDFs, page images, OCR exports, real glossaries, credentials, private paths, cookies, or local caches were added.
- [ ] Fixtures are synthetic or clearly licensed for public use.
- [ ] Release/package changes preserve sanitized output behavior.
